response.justification: While Wei possesses over a decade of strong software engineering experience, including high-throughput microservices and technical leadership as a Staff Engineer, the resume lacks any demonstrated experience in the core domain of this Principal-level role. There is no mention of building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature-flagging systems, or advanced telemetry and metric analysis workflows required for an IC6 Growth/Experimentation position.
strengths: Extensive engineering experience (15+ years) across multiple stacks including JavaScript/TypeScript, C/C++, Java, and DLang.
Proven ability to operate at scale, having built microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Strong technical leadership and community involvement, evidenced by Staff-level titles, open-source projects, and technical workshops.
concerns: Complete lack of domain experience in growth systems, experimentation platforms, or feature-flagging infrastructure.
No demonstrated background in statistical methods, experimental analysis, bias detection, or rollout-risk management.
Limited evidence of cross-team architectural leadership specifically aimed at standardizing data analysis or telemetry foundations at an enterprise scale.
